role: Senior Commander, Ministry of Intelligence (MOIS) (d. 20 March 2026)
bio: Mehdi Rostami Shomastan served as a senior commander within Iran's Ministry of Intelligence (MOIS). He was killed on 20 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).
editorial_notes: Killed 20 March 2026. Senior Intelligence Ministry (MOIS) commander.
